features: No wet spray or added water
Vegan friendly and animal cruelty free
Mulled Wine: Christmas comes once a year, but this air freshener is ideal from autumn all the way through those cold winter months. A warming scent to make you glow
description: Introducing our latest Air Freshener Spray, AirPure & Fresh Ideal for when a room just needs a freshen-up, it neutralises odours with a long-lasting and strong burst of fragrance. These air fresheners are packed full of scent and quickly remove any lingering odours. Perfect for use all around your home.
